name: utmone
description: Give AI agents full access to utm.one — create tracked short links with UTM parameters, get click analytics with device/geo/browser breakdown, run Bayesian A/B tests, generate QR codes, launch multi-channel campaigns, and get AI-powered performance insights.

tools.name: create_link
tools.description: Create a tracked short link with UTM parameters

tools.name: get_link_analytics
tools.description: Get click analytics with device, geo, browser, and referrer breakdown

tools.name: get_workspace_summary
tools.description: Dashboard overview — total links, clicks, active experiments

tools.name: get_campaign_performance
tools.description: Aggregated campaign analytics by source and medium

tools.name: create_experiment
tools.description: Set up a Bayesian A/B test

tools.name: get_experiment_results
tools.description: Live Bayesian stats with win probability and recommendation

tools.name: generate_qr_code
tools.description: Branded QR code for any short link

tools.name: launch_campaign
tools.description: Create multiple tracked links across channels in one call

tools.name: get_smart_insights
tools.description: AI-generated insights from link and campaign performance

resources.description: Live link data with click count and UTM parameters
All links and performance for a campaign
